title: Players online
unsupported: Player count isn't available for this game.
warn_rcon: Couldn't read the player count — the query port isn't reachable.
resolve_confirm: This allocates a port, sets the matching server variable and restarts the server. Continue?
resolving: Setting up… the server is restarting.
resolve_done: Port configured. The server is restarting…

resolve_errors.no_free_allocation: No free allocation. Free a port in the Network tab or raise the server's allocation limit, then try again.
resolve_errors.no_rcon_variable: No RCON port variable found on this server.
resolve_errors.not_running: The server must be fully started.
resolve_errors.apply_failed: The allocation was created, but applying it failed.
resolve_errors.read_context_failed: Couldn't read the server's network configuration.
resolve_errors.no_target_variable: No port variable to configure on this server.
resolve_errors.no_game_port_variable: No game-port variable (SERVER_PORT…) found on this server.
resolve_errors.no_adjacent_pair: Couldn't get an adjacent free port pair — free some ports or raise the allocation limit.
resolve_errors.manual_required: This game needs the query port configured manually.
